questions.question_text_full:
Select the correct indirect form of the given sentence.
She said, “Is anyone there in the house?”

options.text: She asked if anyone was there in the house.
She enquired if someone is there in the house.
She told there is someone in the house.
She asked there is anyone in the house.

questions.correct_option_text: She asked if anyone was there in the house.

questions.question_text_full:
Select the correct passive form of the given sentence.
The masons are building the house.

options.text: The house has been built by the masons.
The house is being built by the masons.
The house was being built by the masons.
The house is building the masons.

questions.correct_option_text: The house is being built by the masons.

questions.question_text_full:
Select the correct passive form of the given sentence.
Animals cannot make tools.

options.text: Animals cannot be made by tools.
Tools cannot be made by animals.
Tools are not to be made by animals.
Tools could not be made by animals.

questions.correct_option_text: Tools cannot be made by animals.

questions.question_text_full:
Select the correct active form of the given sentence.
The terrorist was arrested by Mumbai Police.

options.text: Mumbai Police has arrested the terrorist.
Mumbai Police is arresting the terrorist.
